title: Trial Balance Review Process - AI Augmentation

executiveSummary.description: Trial Balance review is conducted during M+1 to M+7 across all Legal entities, Segment & Group, to understand variance & balance movements between periods. An AI model produces business insights and written commentaries based on GL transaction data analysis - detecting anomalies, trends, unusual movements, new accounts, spikes/drops vs prior periods, and material balances.

fteImpact.currentEffort: 20-25 FTEs, ~4 hrs/day during M-2 to M+5

scope.description: AI automation of TB review at caption level with variance analysis and commentary writing.
inScope: Trial balance review at Finance caption level

stakeholders.name: Modi, Piyush
responsibilities: Approves changes to TB review workflow
Internal review and approval of TB summary
Confirm entry status by M+4 deadline

processSteps.name: Roll Forward Prior Month File
processSteps.description: Copy prior month's TB working file as basis for current month.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: Auto-generate current month template from prior month, pre-populate known parameters, detect structural changes in chart of accounts.

processSteps.name: Download PSGL and Update Master Data
processSteps.description: Download PSGL master account file, update accounts master sheet and parameters.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: Automated PSGL/S4 data extraction via API. Auto-detect new/changed accounts. Alert on master data discrepancies. Support both PSGL and S4 datasets.

processSteps.name: Extract Trial Balance
processSteps.description: Extract TB from PSGL/S4 via SC Bridge into working file.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: Replace manual extraction with automated pipeline pulling from PSGL/S4 APIs. Schedule extraction at optimal times. Validate data completeness on extraction. Support all 234 LEs in parallel.

processSteps.name: Calculate and Filter Variances
processSteps.description: Compute period-over-period variances and apply materiality filters.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: ML-based materiality thresholds that adapt to account patterns. Anomaly detection using historical data (spikes/drops, new accounts, unusual movements). Multi-dimensional variance analysis at caption, segment, and LE levels simultaneously.

processSteps.name: Seek and Update Commentaries
processSteps.description: Request, receive, and record variance explanations from stakeholders.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: LLM-generated draft commentaries based on GL transaction data, historical patterns, and prior period explanations. Auto-route commentary requests to appropriate stakeholders. Track response SLAs and auto-escalate.

processSteps.name: Journal Posting and Investigation
processSteps.description: Check journal posting status, request postings, investigate outstanding entries.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: Auto-detect unposted journals from GL data. Predict which entries need investigation based on historical patterns. Auto-generate journal posting requests with pre-filled details.

processSteps.name: Track Entries and Risk Assessment
processSteps.description: Track overdue entries, assess risks, categorize unexplained variances.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: Predictive risk scoring based on entry age, amount, and team response history. Auto-categorize unexplained variances using NLP classification. Real-time risk dashboard with drill-down capability.

processSteps.name: Prepare Summary and Internal Review
processSteps.description: Consolidate analysis into summary, submit for internal review, incorporate changes.
processSteps.aiAugmentationOpportunity: Auto-generate narrative summary from structured data. Highlight key risk items requiring attention. Generate FORTM pack section automatically. Enable multi-user collaborative review.

decisionPoints.name: Material Variance Threshold
decisionPoints.description: Determine if variances exceed materiality threshold.
decisionPoints.aiApproach: ML-adaptive thresholds based on account category and historical patterns.

decisionPoints.name: Journal Posting Required
decisionPoints.description: Assess whether journal entries need to be posted.
decisionPoints.aiApproach: Auto-detect from GL data with status tracking.

decisionPoints.name: Further Investigation Required
decisionPoints.aiApproach: Predictive model based on entry characteristics and history.

decisionPoints.name: Entry Confirmation by M+4
decisionPoints.description: Check if entry confirmations received by deadline.
decisionPoints.aiApproach: Automated deadline tracking with escalation rules.

riskAssessment.description: Current solutions cover PSGL datasets only; need S4 compatibility.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Build compatible solutions for both PSGL and S4 datasets.

riskAssessment.description: AI solutions need to integrate with SAP and other applications.

projectObjectives: Optimisation of process to improve process maturity levels
E2E process automation including commentary writing
Building block to create SCB Finance LLM
Foundation for daily control operating model
nonFinancialBenefits: Enhanced automated controls aligned with UK ACG requirements
Eliminates EUCs and reduces manual process risk
